description: Event handler for the Crawl skill effect, enabling prone movement for tactical actors

handler_fields.description: Reference to parent Skill instance (inherited from SkillEventHandler). Used to access actor, entity, and clear busy state.
Reference to the Crawl effect data object. Contains the effect configuration.
Path tiles list. Stores calculated crawl path from current position to target. Cleared and repopulated by GetPath().

effect_fields_note: The Crawl effect (stored at handler+0x18) inherits from BaseEffect. Effect-specific fields would be at 0x58+ on the Effect object, not the Handler. CrawlHandler does not directly access 0x58+ offsets on itself - it's a lightweight handler.

base_effect_fields.description: Event/ApplyMode - When the effect triggers (0=OnApply/Instant, 1=WhenAdded, etc.). Common across effect handlers.
Primary value field - type depends on effect (int Value, SkillTemplate* SkillToAdd, etc.)
Secondary config - IValueProvider*, bool OnlyApplyOnHit, etc.
Unique flag - prevents duplicate skill application
Condition reference - optional condition that must be met for effect

constructor.description: Initializes handler. Creates List<Tile> for path storage (0x20), stores effect reference (0x18), calls base constructor.

GetPath.signature: bool GetPath(CrawlHandler* this, Tile* start, List<Tile>* outPath)
GetPath.description: Calculates crawl path from start to destination. Iterates up to 100 tiles using direction-based pathfinding. Validates each tile with IsValidMovementDestination. Returns true if complete path found.

IsEnabled.description: Returns true if crawl action is available. Checks Actor.CanCrawl() and that actor is not already prone (stance != 2).

IsHidden.description: Returns true to hide crawl option in UI. Hidden when actor cannot crawl OR is already prone.

OnMovementFinished.description: Callback when crawl movement completes. Clears skill busy state to allow next action.

OnUse.signature: void OnUse(CrawlHandler* this, Actor* actor, Tile* target)
OnUse.description: Executes crawl movement. Sets movement flags, calls Actor.MoveToWithSkill with crawl mode (0x11). Disables vaulting for all actor elements during movement. Marks actor as having acted.

OnVerifyTarget.signature: bool OnVerifyTarget(CrawlHandler* this, Tile* from, Tile* to)
OnVerifyTarget.description: Validates target tile for crawl. Checks player control restrictions, calculates path, verifies no blocked movement between consecutive tiles.

key_discoveries.details: CrawlHandler has minimal instance data (only 3 fields beyond object header). Path calculation is done on-demand rather than cached.
GetPath has a 100-tile iteration limit with error logging if exceeded. Prevents infinite loops in pathfinding.
OnUse iterates all actor Elements and calls PathMover.DisallowVaultingUntilEndOfMovement() to prevent vaulting while crawling.
Crawl uses movement mode 0x11 (17) passed to Actor.MoveToWithSkill, distinct from normal movement modes.
Uses vtable offset 0x478 to get actor stance. Return value 2 indicates prone state. Both IsEnabled and IsHidden use this check.
OnVerifyTarget checks tile flags at offset 0x1C, specifically bit 3 (mask 0x8) for player control validation.
Handler accesses effect data via handler+0x18. Effect fields at 0x58+ follow standard BaseEffect layout. Crawl effect appears to use default/minimal configuration.

related_types.Tile: Menace.Tactical.Tile - Map tile with movement validation
related_types.Actor: Menace.Tactical.Actor - Entity with CanCrawl, MoveToWithSkill methods
related_types.Skill: Menace.Tactical.Skills.Skill - Parent skill with ClearBusy method
